title: CREATCABIN Metal Tin Sign Hive Rules Bee Happy Retro Vintage Funny Wall Decor Art Mural Hanging Iron Painting for Home Garden Bar Pub Kitchen Living Room Office Garage Poster Plaque 8 x 12inch
features: [HIVE RULES BEE HAPPY TIN SIGNS]: Bees live together in groups, just like people will have neighbors and friends in their lives. Regular interaction with everyone can not only enhance everyone’s emotions, but also make life happier and fulfilling.

[HIVE RULES BEE HAPPY PLAQUE POSTER]: 1pc x hive rules bee happy metal tin sign, size: 8 x 12 inch (20 x 30cm). Thickness: 0.1cm. Hole diameter: 0.5cm. Good decoration for home, bar, coffee shops, garden, restaurants etc

[QUALITY MATERIAL]: The retro tin sign is made of quality tin plate material, durable and waterproof, printed by high-definition digital printing ink, the vivid color and artistic design will last for long time use.
[EAZY TO HANG]: There are 4 holes in each corner for easy hanging and saving time, folds and rounded corners for more security.
[WIDE APPLICATION]: Suitable for decorating door, kitchen, dinning room, garden, cafe, pub and so on, decorate your home with this vintage design to add a little character and style.
